creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-02-02 22:50:13 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    irc/irssi-devel      Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Update to 20100131
  - Change USE_GNOME to LIB_DEPENDS to avoid depends on fam/gamin (as per stable port).
  - Add post-patch target to fixup paths in manpage (as per stable port).
  - Remove duplicate MAKE_JOBS_SAFE.
  - Remove stale libirc_proxy.so.0 pkg-plist entry.
  
  PR:             based on 143468
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.173     +7 -3      ports/irc/irssi-devel/Makefile
  1.124     +3 -3      ports/irc/irssi-devel/distinfo
  1.41      +0 -1      ports/irc/irssi-devel/pkg-plist
